_doc: PINNED BOOT IDENTITY — the single source of the expected md5s every gate/panel/bake/self-test asserts on entry (Guard 5, boot-store assertion). A build that boots on any other store HALTS on line one. Update ONLY at a bake, in the same commit that moves the store; verify_restore.sh, bootstrap.sh, run_panel.sh, ship_gates_check.py and one_source_selftest.py all read THIS file rather than carrying their own hardcoded hex. Origin: stale-boot hardening 2026-07-05 (workspace held baked-v2.4 644d1254 while the repo carried e1b4d8bf; the four data guards validate whichever dir they are imported from, so they never caught the wrong DIRECTORY).

ALL-GATES-OFF reproduces base byte-exact (n=804 sum=723075). Refit board de4baef9->8a66b4ba->f2d6e3f5 (export/display fields, 0 movers). v2.9 BAKE (2026-07-13): L7 NUMÉRAIRE re-base (display-only ÷1.0524) + adopted-curve repoint (pvc_curve_L1b.json, pick-1=3000) + Brodie owner override -> shipped board f2d6e3f5->81e48293. Engine ev()/store/config UNCHANGED (rebase is presentation); OFFICIAL cohort gate PASS 126.8/125.2/116.1 <=130 (ratios invariant). Candidate at the L-STOP (no tag/main until owner word).

_fitted_note: FITTED-ARTIFACT PINS (q97m FREEZE 2026-07-14, owner ruling): every FITTED artifact that determines the board is stamped here and asserted by boot_guard on ENTRY, exactly as the store/band/board/config are. A wrong or missing artifact HALTS on line one — the board's identity is MADE OF these, so an unpinned one is a silent cross-environment mover. 'q97m' = the q97 CEILING model (band[5], price6 weight 0.10), previously a GradientBoostingRegressor.fit() at import (_merged_recover.py:31) pinned by NOTHING — numpy OpenBLAS is DYNAMIC_ARCH so it trained per-CPU on GitHub's mixed fleet (the cross-environment CI red). It is now fitted ONCE at a bake, pickled to data/q97m.pkl, and LOADED, never fitted, by every consumer. Regenerate ONLY via refit_q97m.py at a bake (re-pins here + HALTs downstream). 'peak_model'/'pvc_snapshot'/'bust_prior' = the three further unstamped board inputs (D6): the peak-model pickle + its FROZEN train-time PVC snapshot + the bust-prior table; regenerated only by build_peak_model_v4.py at a bake.
_determinism_note: DETERMINISM FIX (2026-07-14, session_2026-07-14/determinism_fix — candidate, no bake/tag/main). PART 1 bisect measured the cross-environment board mover as par_build.py loclin's BLAS `@`+np.linalg.solve (the PAR table), NOT the NW-smoother (register item 106) and NOT price6. Replaced with an order-fixed math.fsum closed-form + LU (well-conditioned cells) and a weighted-mean fallback for rank-deficient low-pick cells; price6/NW np.dot also order-fixed in _merged_recover.py. Board e6a8e6ef -> 800bf461: 8 rucks move +1..+4 SCAR (float precision; the same 8 that wobbled across kernels), 796 unchanged, PICK1=3000. engine_head fef5719d -> 118f8ac6 (_merged_recover.py). par_build.py is not individually pinned; its effect is captured in the board md5. A1 PROVEN: native/SkylakeX == forced-Haswell == forced-Prescott(SSE) == forced-Nehalem(SSE4.2) all build 800bf461 on one box.
_fv_note: FORWARD-VALUATION SOURCE-SET IDENTITY (fv-provenance remediation 2026-07-20, session_2026-07-20/fv_provenance_remediation). The canonical tree hash (sha256 over the SORTED relative paths + exact-byte sha256 of every *.py in engine/forward_valuation) of the COMPLETE imported forward-valuation Python source set: build_cohort_book.py, build_peak_model_v4.py, conditional_prior.py, dist_redesign.py, distribution_pricing.py, par_build.py, par_redesign.py, tail_restore.py. Closes the exact hole that produced the 06d8af60 -> d7a95e8d 109-wobble: expected_boot pinned the store/engine/q97m/v0surf but NOT the forward_valuation modules that feed current v, so a stale distribution_pricing.py (21d530bf, missing the Leg-C §1b DPP law) was imported silently and NO guard fired (ROOT_CAUSE.md). boot_guard (Guard 5) now asserts BOTH (a) checkout integrity: the checked-out engine/forward_valuation source set == this pin, AND (b) loaded-path integrity: the EXACT RL_FV directory the engine will import == this pin; either mismatch (or an unresolved RL_FV) HALTS before board generation, naming the resolved RL_FV, computed identity, expected identity and the failure class (checkout drift / loaded-path drift / unresolved path). The identity changes when ANY imported forward-valuation source changes (not distribution_pricing alone). Re-stamp ONLY at a bake, in the same commit that moves an engine/forward_valuation source, exactly as the store/engine pins move. CORRECTIVE 2026-07-20 (review finding 2): the pin moved fa060917 -> de4c7ec3 because par_redesign.py and build_cohort_book.py were edited to call the ONE canonical resolver fv_provenance.resolve_fv (removing their duplicated source-selection logic so Guard 5 and the production loader cannot resolve differently). Import-only edits inside engine/forward_valuation necessarily change the source-set tree hash; the board 06d8af60 is byte-identical (0 movers) across the change (no valuation math touched).

Engine code UNTOUCHED at the store migration (head 7a07e369) -> board de4baef9; book RE-SEALED for the new store (n re-counted). [v2.9 REFIT+BAKE 2026-07-13 rides ON this store: engine 7a07e369->2030e5df (6 env-gated levers, default-ON), board de4baef9->8a66b4ba->f2d6e3f5->81e48293 (refit -> export/display -> L7 numéraire+override BAKE, display-only), store b0c39d78 UNCHANGED; cohort gate PASS 126.8/125.2/116.1; see _engine_head_note.] Board movers vs 9ecbe0fa: 94 = 5 DOB + adams removed + 88 hairline retirement ripple (<=+/-2 SCAR, owner-declared expected). _evidence_weight_note: EVIDENCE WEIGHT (RL_EVW, 2026-07-15, session_2026-07-15/evidence_weight; candidate, no bake/tag/main). The FOUR discrete evidence regimes — the 10-game qualifying bar (_nqual), the nqual ramp (c=n/4), the PROVEN_N n=3->4 cliff (pedigree par vanishing), the exposure regime (expgate n>=4 gate) — are replaced by ONE continuous evidence weight on effective qualifying seasons E_q: pedigree fades to the T5-measured residual r=0.11 (never vanishes, R98.5); L-SMOOTH. engine _merged_recover.py 113a4223->edc47017; board 24159c49->9a9889f8 (403 movers, SigmaD -5714 num-SCAR); store 340a7a32 UNCHANGED; config c2d233ae UNMOVED (RL_EVW is a declared kill-switch, not a manifest dial: RL_EVW=0 reproduces board 24159c49 byte-exact). book RE-SEALED. A8 Berry/Tsatas holds 2.28x; B1 cohort PASSx3; A9 Ginnivan/Ward flips on the T5 residual (owner ruling). Candidate — owner tag/main promote remain owner-only.
_improver_note: IMPROVER BUILD (three legs, 2026-07-15, session_2026-07-15/improver; candidate, no bake/tag/main). RL_EO2 (kill the _eo min() => two-directional anti-flattery), RL_LSYM (L-SYMMETRY: equal bar DOWN_TOL + no _radq + smooth onset ramp on the riser side), RL_SAGE29 (the S_AGE 29-tail: age-29 slope 0.0269->0.3793, fade still zero AT 30). engine edc47017 -> fc7045d6; board 9a9889f8 -> dc43d602. store 340a7a32 UNCHANGED; config c2d233ae UNMOVED (three DECLARED kill-switches, not manifest dials; all-off reproduces 9a9889f8 byte-exact). book RE-SEALED. Candidate — owner tag/main promote remain owner-only.

Owner tag/main promote owner-only.
_captaincy_note: L-CAPTAIN WIRE (the ruled captain curve, 2026-07-15, session_2026-07-15/captaincy; candidate, no bake/tag/main). credit(L)=G*integral[BAR->L]P(a)da (P logistic, BAR 105.0 M 109.5 W 1.85 G 1.00; the marginal IS P(L) so the slope-1 ceiling is structural) replaces the RETIRED saturating capt_prem (CAPT_GAIN/EXP/CAP, bar 107.4, hard 18-pt cap — never owner-ratified). Candidate — owner tag/main promote owner-only.
_isofade_note: LEG A — iso_corr EVIDENCE-FADE + ISO MONOTONIZATION (RL_ISOFADE, 2026-07-16, session_2026-07-16/isofade; candidate, no bake/tag/main). iso_corr(pos,pk) gains an evidence fade in the house pedigree-fade family on the v2.10 evidence weight w=E_q (iso_eff = 1 + (iso_corr-1)*exp(-w/1.1), residual-0 member; full strength at zero evidence => V0 unchanged BY CONSTRUCTION, -> 1.0 as evidence saturates), wired at all 6 iso_corr sites; the ISO multiplier is MONOTONIZED non-increasing in pick (IsotonicRegression(increasing=False), conserving) killing the Newcombe trough. Fade applies to REAL players only (synths = structural scaffolds, unfaded). engine fc7045d6 -> a83c9f6d; board 790136a3 -> 8d90c9ac. store b1fd0bce UNCHANGED; config c2d233ae UNMOVED (RL_ISOFADE is a DECLARED kill-switch, not a manifest dial: RL_ISOFADE=0 reproduces board 790136a3 byte-exact, proven full-board md5). book RE-SEALED. Candidate — owner tag/main promote owner-only.

_legd_act2_note: LEG D ACT-2 — PVC RE-DERIVATION (RL_PVC2, 2026-07-17 session_2026-07-17/legd_derivation; candidate, no bake/tag/main). _merged_recover.py bea8fea8 -> 40f43772: added the RL_PVC2 block (default ON, a DECLARED kill-switch, config UNMOVED), an EXACT parallel of RL_PVCADOPT — loads the offline-derived COMPOSED-PATHWAY curve pvc_curve_v2.json (curve_md5 89c14729; owner ruling R1: the year-0 point of the 2-D pick x career-year evidence-weighted NON-median fit, busts full weight, no games floor, no threshold) into _PVC0 + rebuilds V0 guard/curve/RUC ceiling. _final_integration_note: FINAL INTEGRATION 2026-07-21 (integration/v2.11-final-rc): board pin = 2ab73a6fed1f06fc8eecc2ce597c2aec. FINAL INTEGRATION 2026-07-21 (integration/v2.11-final-rc): the CANONICAL ENGINE BUILD (rl_export.py under RL_PVC2=1/RL_LEGE=1/RL_LEGF=1) reproduces this board from tracked code + canonical store + the sealed F5 input (session_2026-07-18/legf5/sealed_entrant_structure.json, seal a17aafed) — NO diagnostic artifact is a build input. It equals accepted Board B (1f10220c) on present v + vP1 + vP2 + row universe (0 diffs, Board B used as oracle only) and adds the owner-facing visible future-draft asset ladder (2027/2028 Draft Pick 1-64 at release-active PVC, ranked among players) + the F5 reconciliation. balanced_board_md5 06d8af60 preserved as the present-lens lineage. config 3a1e714f unchanged; store 968de0c7 unchanged.
_season_state_note: SEASON-STATE WIRING (final integration 2026-07-21, supervisor 2nd review): the engine now reads the DYNAMIC season state from data/season_state.json — calendar_progress (was frozen SEASON_PROG=0.58 / RL_M3_FE) and exposure_pace (was RL_EXPO_F=0.545) — both DERIVED and advancing weekly. rl_model.py + _merged_recover.py + engine/forward_valuation/conditional_prior.py were edited to reroute those reads, so rl_model cc626d7d->c3a243ee->4f776e07, engine_head 904722cd->feff9471->dc7e34b0, fv de4c7ec3->97abe963->6a9a520f re-pinned. The SECOND move is the supervisor 3rd-review FENCING: the season readers now HALT under RL_CONFIG_MODE=bake|gate|canonical (missing/malformed/incomplete/non-finite season_state.json, or an unresolved root) instead of silently falling back to a Round-14 default. At the R14 boundary the derived values still equal the prior frozen values (0.58/0.545) so the board stays BYTE-IDENTICAL (2ab73a6f); only the source identities move.
